introSection: Galaxy 500 Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Cedar Valley's Wild Frontier Fun Park in Comins, Michigan, USA. It has previously operated at Adventureland, Pharaoh's Lost Kingdom, Miracle Strip Pier Park and Hydro Adventures. It is a Galaxi unit from by SDC.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The roller coaster first opened at Adventureland in Iowa in 1976.

The coaster opened at Hydro Adventures in 2016. It opened at Cedar Valley's Wild Frontier Fun Park on July 10, 2021.

sections.title: Miracle Strip Pier Park and onwards

fullText:
Galaxy 500 Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Cedar Valley's Wild Frontier Fun Park in Comins, Michigan, USA. It has previously operated at Adventureland, Pharaoh's Lost Kingdom, Miracle Strip Pier Park and Hydro Adventures. It is a Galaxi unit from by SDC.

The roller coaster first opened at Adventureland in Iowa in 1976.

The coaster opened at Hydro Adventures in 2016. It opened at Cedar Valley's Wild Frontier Fun Park on July 10, 2021.





Yellow track and red supports.

White track and supports.

Yellow track and white supports
